Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Lattice *)
(** Catherine Lelay. Nov. 2016 - *)
(**
Definition of a lattice: (Burris, S., & Sankappanavar, H. P. (2006).
A Course in Universal Algebra-With 36 Illustrations. Chapter I)
A lattice is a set with two binary operators min and max such that:
- min and max are associative
- min and max are commutative
- ∏ x y : X, min x (max x y) = x
- ∏ x y : X, max x (min x y) = x

In a lattice, we can define a partial order:
- le := λ (x y : X), min lat x y = x

Lattice with a strong order:
A lattice equipped with a strong order gt such that additionally:
- ∏ (x y : X), (¬ gt x y) <-> le x y
- ∏ x y z : X, gt x z → gt y z → gt (min x y) z
- ∏ x y z : X, gt z x → gt z y → gt z (max lat x y)

Lattice with a total and decidable order:
- le is total and decidable
- it is a lattice with a strong order *)

(**
Lattice in an abelian monoid:
- compatibility and cancelation of addition for le

Truncated minus is a lattice:
- a function minus such that: ∏ (x y : X), (minus x y) + y = max x y *)

(**
Define new lattices using:
- weq
- abmonoidfrac
*)

(**
Define dual lattice
*)


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.

(** ** Definition *)

Definition islatticeop {X : hSet} (min max : binop X) : UU :=
  ((isassoc min) × (iscomm min))
    × ((isassoc max) × (iscomm max))
    × (isabsorb min max)
    × (isabsorb max min).

X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (islatticeop min max)


X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (islatticeop min max)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isassoc min)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm min)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isassoc max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb min max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm min)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isassoc max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb min max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isassoc max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb min max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (iscomm max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb min max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb min max)
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb max min)

  apply isapropisabsorb.
Qed.

Definition lattice (X : hSet) :=
  ∑ min max : binop X, islatticeop min max.

Definition make_lattice {X : hSet} {min max : binop X} : islatticeop min max → lattice X :=
  λ (is : islatticeop min max), min,, max ,, is.

Definition Lmin {X : hSet} (lat : lattice X) : binop X := pr1 lat.
Definition Lmax {X : hSet} (lat : lattice X) : binop X := pr1 (pr2 lat).


X: hSet
isaset (lattice X)


X: hSet
isaset (lattice X)


X: hSet
isaset (binop X)
X: hSet
∏ x : binop X,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : binop X,
    ∑ max : binop X, islatticeop x0 max) x)


X: hSet
isaset (binop X)
 use (isasetbinoponhSet X).

X: hSet
∏ x : binop X,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : binop X,
    ∑ max : binop X, islatticeop x0 max) x)
 
X: hSet
min: binop X
isaset
  ((λ x : binop X, ∑ max : binop X, islatticeop x max)
     min)

  
X: hSet
min: binop X
isaset (binop X)
X: hSet
min: binop X
∏ x : binop X, isaset (islatticeop min x)

  
X: hSet
min: binop X
isaset (binop X)
 use (isasetbinoponhSet X).
  
X: hSet
min: binop X
∏ x : binop X, isaset (islatticeop min x)
 
X: hSet
min, max: binop X
isaset (islatticeop min max)

     use (isasetaprop (isaprop_islatticeop _ _)).
Defined.

Section lattice_pty.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : lattice X).

Definition isassoc_Lmin : isassoc (Lmin lat) :=
  pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 lat))).
Definition iscomm_Lmin : iscomm (Lmin lat) :=
  pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 lat))).
Definition isassoc_Lmax : isassoc (Lmax lat) :=
  pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat)))).
Definition iscomm_Lmax : iscomm (Lmax lat) :=
  pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat)))).
Definition Lmin_absorb : isabsorb (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat) :=
  pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat)))).
Definition Lmax_absorb : isabsorb (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat) :=
  pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat)))).


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
∏ x : X, Lmin lat x x = x


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
∏ x : X, Lmin lat x x = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmin lat x x = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmin lat x x = Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x x))
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x x)) = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmin lat x x = Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x x))
 apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, Lmax_absorb.
  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x x)) = x
 apply Lmin_absorb.
Qed.

X: hSet
lat: lattice X
∏ x : X, Lmax lat x x = x


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
∏ x : X, Lmax lat x x = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmax lat x x = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmax lat x x = Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x x))
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x x)) = x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmax lat x x = Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x x))
 apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, Lmin_absorb.
  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x: X
Lmax lat x (Lmin lat x (Lmax lat x x)) = x
 apply Lmax_absorb.
Qed.

End lattice_pty.

(** ** Partial order in a lattice *)

(** [Lle] *)

Definition Lle {X : hSet} (lat : lattice X) : hrel X :=
  λ (x y : X), (Lmin lat x y = x)%logic.

Section lattice_le.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : lattice X).

Definition isrefl_Lle : isrefl (Lle lat) :=
  Lmin_id lat.

X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isantisymm (Lle lat)


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isantisymm (Lle lat)

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hxy: Lle lat x y
Hyx: Lle lat y x
x = y

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hxy: Lle lat x y
Hyx: Lle lat y x
Lmin lat x y = y

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hxy: Lle lat x y
Hyx: Lle lat y x
Lmin lat x y = Lmin lat y x

  apply iscomm_Lmin.
Qed.

X: hSet
lat: lattice X
istrans (Lle lat)


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
istrans (Lle lat)

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y, z: X
Lle lat (Lmin lat x (Lmin lat y z)) z

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y, z: X
Lmin lat (Lmin lat x (Lmin lat y z)) z =
Lmin lat x (Lmin lat y z)

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y, z: X
Lmin lat x (Lmin lat y z) = Lmin lat x (Lmin lat y z)

  reflexivity.
Qed.

X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isPartialOrder (Lle lat)

isPartialOrder (Lle lat)

isrefl (Lle lat)
X: hSet

isantisymm (Lle lat)

 exact istrans_Lle.
  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isrefl (Lle lat)
 exact isrefl_Lle.
  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isantisymm (Lle lat)
 exact isantisymm_Lle.
Qed.

Lmin lat x y = Lmin lat x y

  reflexivity.
Qed.

Lle lat (Lmin lat y x) y

  apply Lmin_le_l.
Qed.

Lle lat z x → Lle lat z y → Lle lat z (Lmin lat x y)

Lmin lat (Lmin lat z x) y

  
X: hSet

x, y, z: X
Lmin lat z (Lmin lat x y) = Lmin lat (Lmin lat z x) y

  apply pathsinv0, isassoc_Lmin.
Qed.

  apply Lmin_absorb.
Qed.

x, y, z: X

z =
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (Lmin lat x z) (Lmin lat y z)) z

    now rewrite isassoc_Lmax, (iscomm_Lmax _ (Lmin _ y z) _),
    (iscomm_Lmin _ y z), Lmax_absorb, iscomm_Lmax, iscomm_Lmin, Lmax_absorb.

w:= Lmax lat (Lmin lat x z) (Lmin lat y z): X
c: z = Lmax lat w z
Lle lat w z

lat: lattice X
x, y, z: X
w:= Lmax lat (Lmin lat x z) (Lmin lat y z): X
c: z = Lmax lat w z
Lle lat w (Lmax lat w z)
 use (Lmin_absorb lat).
Qed.

End lattice_le.

(** [Lge] *)

Definition Lge {X : hSet} (lat : lattice X) : hrel X :=
  λ x y : X, Lle lat y x.

Section Lge_pty.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : lattice X).

Definition isrefl_Lge : isrefl (Lge lat) :=
  isrefl_Lle lat.

X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isantisymm (Lge lat)


X: hSet
lat: lattice X
isantisymm (Lge lat)

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hle: Lge lat x y
Hge: Lge lat y x
x = y

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hle: Lge lat x y
Hge: Lge lat y x
Lle lat x y
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hle: Lge lat x y
Hge: Lge lat y x
Lle lat y x

  
X: hSet
lat: lattice X
x, y: X
Hle: Lge lat x y
Hge: Lge lat y x
Lle lat y x

  exact Hle.
Qed.

istrans (Lge lat)

  exact Hxy.
Qed.

 exact istrans_Lge.

isantisymm (Lge lat)
 exact isantisymm_Lge.
Qed.

Definition Lmin_ge_l :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat x (Lmin lat x y) :=
  Lmin_le_l lat.
Definition Lmin_ge_r :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat y (Lmin lat x y) :=
  Lmin_le_r lat.
Definition Lmin_ge_case :
  ∏ (x y z : X),
  Lge lat x z → Lge lat y z → Lge lat (Lmin lat x y) z :=
  Lmin_le_case lat.

Definition Lmax_ge_l :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat (Lmax lat x y) x :=
  Lmax_le_l lat.
Definition Lmax_ge_r :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat (Lmax lat x y) y :=
  Lmax_le_r lat.
Definition Lmax_ge_case :
  ∏ x y z : X, Lge lat z x → Lge lat z y → Lge lat z (Lmax lat x y) :=
  Lmax_le_case lat.

Definition Lmin_ge_eq_l :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat y x → Lmin lat x y = x :=
  Lmin_le_eq_l lat.
Definition Lmin_ge_eq_r :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat x y → Lmin lat x y = y :=
  Lmin_le_eq_r lat.

Definition Lmax_ge_eq_l :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat x y → Lmax lat x y = x :=
  Lmax_le_eq_l lat.
Definition Lmax_ge_eq_r :
  ∏ (x y : X), Lge lat y x → Lmax lat x y = y :=
  Lmax_le_eq_r lat.

End Lge_pty.

(** ** Lattice with a strong order *)

Definition islatticewithgtrel {X : hSet} (lat : lattice X) (gt : StrongOrder X) :=
  (∏ x y : X, (¬ (gt x y)) <-> Lle lat x y)
    × (∏ x y z : X, gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z)
    × (∏ x y z : X, gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)).

Definition latticewithgt (X : hSet) :=
  ∑ (lat : lattice X) (gt : StrongOrder X), islatticewithgtrel lat gt.

Definition lattice_latticewithgt {X : hSet} : latticewithgt X → lattice X :=
  pr1.
Coercion lattice_latticewithgt : latticewithgt >-> lattice.

(** [Lgt] *)

Definition Lgt {X : hSet} (lat : latticewithgt X) : StrongOrder X :=
  pr1 (pr2 lat).

Section latticewithgt_pty.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : latticewithgt X).

Definition notLgt_Lle :
  ∏ x y : X, (¬ Lgt lat x y) → Lle lat x y :=
  λ x y : X, pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 lat)) x y).
Definition Lle_notLgt :
  ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ Lgt lat x y :=
  λ x y : X, pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 lat)) x y).

Definition isirrefl_Lgt : isirrefl (Lgt lat) :=
  isirrefl_isStrongOrder (Lgt lat).
Definition istrans_Lgt : istrans (Lgt lat) :=
  istrans_isStrongOrder (Lgt lat).
Definition iscotrans_Lgt : iscotrans (Lgt lat) :=
  iscotrans_isStrongOrder (Lgt lat).
Definition isasymm_Lgt : isasymm (Lgt lat) :=
  isasymm_isStrongOrder (Lgt lat).

Lgt lat ?x2 ?x1

Lgt lat y x

  exact H0.
Qed.

Hge: Lge lat y z

Definition Lmin_Lgt :
  ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat x z → Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (Lmin lat x y) z :=
  pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat))).

Definition Lmax_Lgt :
  ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat z x → Lgt lat z y → Lgt lat z (Lmax lat x y) :=
  pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 lat))).

End latticewithgt_pty.

(** ** Lattice with a total order *)

Definition latticedec (X : hSet) :=
  ∑ lat : lattice X, istotal (Lle lat) × (isdecrel (Lle lat)).
Definition lattice_latticedec {X : hSet} (lat : latticedec X) : lattice X :=
  pr1 lat.
Coercion lattice_latticedec : latticedec >-> lattice.
Definition istotal_latticedec {X : hSet} (lat : latticedec X) : istotal (Lle lat) :=
  pr1 (pr2 lat).
Definition isdecrel_latticedec {X : hSet} (lat : latticedec X) : isdecrel (Lle lat) :=
  pr2 (pr2 lat).

Section latticedec_pty.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : latticedec X).

(Lle lat x y → P x)
→ (Lle lat y x → P y) → P (Lmin lat x y)

End latticedec_pty.

(** It is a lattice with a strong order *)

Section latticedec_gt.

Context {X : hSet}
        (lat : latticedec X).

Definition latticedec_gt_rel : hrel X :=
  λ x y, hneg (Lle lat x y).


X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
∏ x y : X, latticedec_gt_rel x y → Lge lat x y


X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
∏ x y : X, latticedec_gt_rel x y → Lge lat x y

  
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
Lge lat x y

  
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
Lle lat x y ∨ Lle lat y x → Lge lat x y

  
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
H: Lle lat x y
Lge lat x y
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
H: Lle lat y x
Lge lat x y

  
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
H: Lle lat x y
Lge lat x y
 
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
H: Lle lat x y
∅

    exact (Hxy H).
  
X: hSet
lat: latticedec X
x, y: X
Hxy: latticedec_gt_rel x y
H: Lle lat y x
Lge lat x y
 exact H.
Qed.

  → latticedec_gt_so (Lmin lat x y) z

→ latticedec_gt_so z y
  → latticedec_gt_so z (Lmax lat x y)
 apply latticedec_gtmax.
Defined.

End latticedec_gt.

(** ** Lattice in an abmonoid *)

Local Open Scope addmonoid.

Section lattice_abmonoid.

Context {X : abmonoid}
        (lat : lattice X)
        (is0 : isrcancellative (@op X))
        (is2 : isrdistr (Lmin lat) op).


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
∏ k x y : X, Lle lat x y → Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
∏ k x y : X, Lle lat x y → Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat x y
Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat x y
Lmin lat (x + k) (y + k) = x + k

  now rewrite <- is2, H.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
∏ k x y : X, Lle lat (x + k) (y + k) → Lle lat x y


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
∏ k x y : X, Lle lat (x + k) (y + k) → Lle lat x y

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)
Lle lat x y

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)
?opp (Lmin lat x y) ?x = ?opp x ?x
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
 apply is0. 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
is0: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (x + k) (y + k)
Lmin lat x y + ?x = x + ?x

  now rewrite is2, H.
Qed.

End lattice_abmonoid.

(** ** Truncated minus *)

Definition istruncminus {X : abmonoid} (lat : lattice X) (minus : binop X) :=
  ∏ x y : X, minus x y + y = Lmax lat x y.

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
minus: binop X
isaprop (istruncminus lat minus)


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
minus: binop X
isaprop (istruncminus lat minus)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
minus: binop X
x: X
isaprop (∏ y : X, minus x y + y = Lmax lat x y)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
minus: binop X
x, y: X
isaprop (minus x y + y = Lmax lat x y)

  apply setproperty.
Qed.

Definition extruncminus {X : abmonoid} (lat : lattice X) :=
  ∑ minus : binop X, istruncminus lat minus.

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
isaprop (extruncminus lat)


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
isaprop (extruncminus lat)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
iscontr (minus1 = minus2)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
isaprop (minus1 = minus2)
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
minus1 = minus2

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
isaprop (minus1 = minus2)
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
isaset (binop X)
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
∏ x : binop X, isaset (istruncminus lat x)

lat: lattice X

minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
isaset (X → X)

∏ x : binop X, isaset (istruncminus lat x)

minus: binop X

minus: binop X

    apply isaprop_istruncminus.

Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
minus1 = minus2

lat: lattice X

minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
isPredicate (istruncminus lat)

pr1 minus1 = pr1 minus2

minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat

f: binop X

 apply isaprop_istruncminus.

lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
pr1 minus1 = pr1 minus2
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x: X
pr1 minus1 x = pr1 minus2 x

      
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
pr1 minus1 x y = pr1 minus2 x y

      
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
?opp (pr1 minus1 x y) ?x = ?opp (pr1 minus2 x y) ?x
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
 apply Hop. 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
pr1 minus1 x y + ?x = pr1 minus2 x y + ?x

      
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
Hop: isrcancellative op
minus1, minus2: extruncminus lat
x, y: X
Lmax lat x y = pr1 minus2 x y + y

      apply pathsinv0, (pr2 minus2).
Qed.

Definition truncminus {X : abmonoid} {lat : lattice X} (ex : extruncminus lat) : binop X :=
  pr1 ex.


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
∏ x y : X, truncminus ex x y + y = Lmax lat x y


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
∏ x y : X, truncminus ex x y + y = Lmax lat x y

  apply (pr2 ex).
Qed.

Section truncminus_pty.

Context {X : abmonoid}
        {lat : lattice X}
        (ex : extruncminus lat)
        (is1 : isrcancellative (@op X))
        (is2 : isrdistr (Lmax lat) op)
        (is3 : isrdistr (Lmin lat) op)
        (is4 : isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat))
        (is5 : isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)).


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ x : X, truncminus ex x 0 = Lmax lat x 0

is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x: X
truncminus ex x 0 + 0 = Lmax lat x 0

  apply (istruncminus_ex).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op

is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x, y: X
H: Lle lat x y
y = 0 + y

  apply pathsinv0, (lunax X).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)

ex: extruncminus lat

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat

is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x: X
Hx: Lle lat 0 x
truncminus ex 0 x = 0

  apply truncminus_eq_0, Hx.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op

∏ x : X, Lle lat x 0 → truncminus ex 0 x + x = 0

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x: X
Hx: Lle lat x 0
truncminus ex 0 x + x = 0

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x: X
Hx: Lle lat x 0
Lmax lat 0 x = 0

  apply Lmax_le_eq_l, Hx.
Qed.

is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op

is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ x y : X, Lle lat 0 (truncminus ex x y)

ex: extruncminus lat

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

Lle lat y (Lmax lat x y)

  apply Lmax_ge_r.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ x y : X,
Lle lat 0 x
→ Lle lat x y
  → truncminus ex y (truncminus ex y x) = x

Lle lat 0 x
→ Lle lat x y
  → truncminus ex y (truncminus ex y x) = x

ex: extruncminus lat

Hxy: Lle lat x y
truncminus ex y (truncminus ex y x) = x

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
x, y: X
Hx: Lle lat 0 x
Hxy: Lle lat x y
?opp (truncminus ex y (truncminus ex y x)) ?x =
?opp x ?x

Hxy: Lle lat x y

Hxy: Lle lat x y

truncminus ?ex ?x x = Lmax ?Goal ?x x

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat

truncminus ?ex ?x x = ?Goal0

lat: lattice X

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ k x y : X,
Lle lat x y
→ Lle lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k)


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ k x y : X,
Lle lat x y
→ Lle lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
Lle lat (truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k)
  (truncminus ex y k)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
?opp
  (Lmin lat (truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k)
     (truncminus ex y k)) ?x =
?opp (truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k) ?x
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
 apply is1.

lat: lattice X

is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op

is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
Lmin lat (truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k)
  (truncminus ex y k) + ?x =
truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k + ?x

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op

k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat k (Lmax lat x y) =
Lmin lat (truncminus ex k x + Lmax lat x y)
  (truncminus ex k y + Lmax lat x y)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat k (Lmax lat x y) =
Lmin lat
  (Lmax lat (x + truncminus ex k x)
     (y + truncminus ex k x))
  (Lmax lat (x + truncminus ex k y)
     (y + truncminus ex k y))

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat

is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat k (Lmax lat x y) =
Lmin lat
  (Lmax lat (Lmax lat k x) (truncminus ex k x + y))
  (Lmax lat (truncminus ex k y + x) (Lmax lat k y))

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op

Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + ?x) (y + ?x)) (k + ?x) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + ?x) (truncminus ex k x + y + ?x))
     (Lmax lat (y + ?x) (truncminus ex k y + x + ?x)))
  (k + ?x)

?opp (Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + x) (x + y)) (k + x)) ?x =
?opp
  (Lmax lat
     (Lmin lat
        (Lmax lat (x + x) (Lmax lat (k + y) (x + y)))

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + x) (x + y)) (k + x) + y =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + x) (Lmax lat (k + y) (x + y)))
     (Lmax lat (x + y) (truncminus ex k y + x + x)))
  (k + x) + y

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + x + y) (x + y + y))
  (k + x + y) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + x + y)
        (Lmax lat (k + y + y) (x + y + y)))
     (Lmax lat (x + y + y)
        (truncminus ex k y + x + x + y))) (k + x + y)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + (x + y)) (x + (y + y)))
  (k + (x + y)) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + (x + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + (y + y)) (x + (y + y))))
     (Lmax lat (x + (y + y))
        (x + (x + (truncminus ex k y + y)))))
  (k + (x + y))

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op

H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + (x + y)) (x + (y + y)))
  (k + (x + y)) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + (x + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + (y + y)) (x + (y + y))))
     (Lmax lat (x + (y + y)) (x + (x + Lmax lat k y))))
  (k + (x + y))

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + (x + y)) (x + (y + y)))
  (k + (x + y)) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + (x + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + (y + y)) (x + (y + y))))
     (Lmax lat (x + (y + y))
        (x + Lmax lat (k + x) (y + x)))) (k + (x + y))

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + (x + y)) (x + (y + y)))
  (k + (x + y)) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + (x + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + (y + y)) (x + (y + y))))
     (Lmax lat (x + (y + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + x + x) (y + x + x))))
  (k + (x + y))

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op

is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + (x + y)) (x + (y + y)))
  (k + (x + y)) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmin lat
     (Lmax lat (x + (x + y))
        (Lmax lat (k + (y + y)) (x + (y + y))))
     (Lmax lat (x + (y + y))
        (Lmax lat (x + (x + k)) (x + (x + y)))))
  (k + (x + y))

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat

is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

        (Lmax lat (x + (x + k)) (x + (x + y)))))

ex: extruncminus lat

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op

is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + x + y) (x + y + y))
  (x + y + k) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmax lat
     (Lmax lat (Lmin lat (y + y + k) (x + x + k))
        (x + x + y)) (x + y + y)) (x + y + k)

lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat

Lmax lat (Lmax lat (x + x + y) (x + y + y))
  (x + y + k) =
Lmax lat
  (Lmax lat
     (Lmax lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x) + k)
        (x + x + y)) (x + y + y)) (x + y + k)

H: Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)
Lle lat (Lmin lat (y + y) (x + x)) (x + y)

  exact H.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
∏ k x y : X,
truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k =
Lmin lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k)

is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)

truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k =
Lmin lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k)

ex: extruncminus lat

X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
?opp (truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k) ?x =
?opp
  (Lmin lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k))
  ?x
 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
isrcancelable ?opp ?x
 apply (is1 k). 
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k + k =
Lmin lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k) + k

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k + k =
Lmin lat (truncminus ex x k) (truncminus ex y k) + k

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
truncminus ex (Lmin lat x y) k + k =
Lmin lat (Lmax lat x k) (Lmax lat y k)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: lattice X
ex: extruncminus lat
is1: isrcancellative op
is2: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
is3: isrdistr (Lmin lat) op
is4: isrdistr (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)
is5: isrdistr (Lmax lat) (Lmin lat)
k, x, y: X
Lmax lat (Lmin lat x y) k =
Lmin lat (Lmax lat x k) (Lmax lat y k)

  apply is4.
Qed.

End truncminus_pty.


X: abgr
lat: lattice X
isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
→ istruncminus lat
    (λ x y : X, Lmax lat 0 (x - y)%abgr)


X: abgr
lat: lattice X
isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
→ istruncminus lat
    (λ x y : X, Lmax lat 0 (x - y)%abgr)

  
X: abgr
lat: lattice X
H: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
x, y: X
Lmax lat 0 (x - y)%abgr + y = Lmax lat x y

  
X: abgr
lat: lattice X
H: isrdistr (Lmax lat) op
x, y: X
Lmax lat y x = Lmax lat x y

  apply iscomm_Lmax.
Qed.

Section truncminus_gt.

Context {X : abmonoid}
        (lat : latticewithgt X)
        (ex : extruncminus lat)
        (is0 : ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x))
        (is1 : ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z).


X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
∏ x y : X, Lgt lat x y → Lgt lat (truncminus ex x y) 0


X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
∏ x y : X, Lgt lat x y → Lgt lat (truncminus ex x y) 0

  
X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat

is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
Lgt lat x y → Lgt lat (truncminus ex x y) 0

  
X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat x y
Lgt lat (truncminus ex x y) 0

lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat

is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat x y
Lgt lat (truncminus ex x y + y) (0 + y)

  
X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat

is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat x y
Lgt lat (Lmax lat x y) y

lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat

is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat x y
Lgt lat x y
X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X

Lle lat y x

  
X: abmonoid
lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat x y
Lle lat y x

  apply Lgt_Lge, H.
Qed.

lat: latticewithgt X
ex: extruncminus lat
is0: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x)
is1: ∏ x y z : X, Lgt lat (y + x) (z + x) → Lgt lat y z
x, y: X
H: Lgt lat y x
Lgt lat y x

  exact H.
Qed.

End truncminus_gt.

Close Scope addmonoid.

(** ** lattice and [weq] *)

(** *** Definition *)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
islatticeop (binop_weq_bck H min)
  (binop_weq_bck H max)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
islatticeop (binop_weq_bck H min)
  (binop_weq_bck H max)

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
islatticeop (binop_weq_bck H min)
  (binop_weq_bck H max)

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isassoc (binop_weq_bck H min)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
iscomm (binop_weq_bck H min)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isassoc (binop_weq_bck H max)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
iscomm (binop_weq_bck H max)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isabsorb (binop_weq_bck H min) (binop_weq_bck H max)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isabsorb (binop_weq_bck H max) (binop_weq_bck H min)

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isassoc (binop_weq_bck H min)
 apply (isassoc_weq_bck H), (isassoc_Lmin (_,,_,,lat)).
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
iscomm (binop_weq_bck H min)
 apply (iscomm_weq_bck H), (iscomm_Lmin (_,,_,,lat)).
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isassoc (binop_weq_bck H max)
 apply (isassoc_weq_bck H), (isassoc_Lmax (_,,_,,lat)).
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
iscomm (binop_weq_bck H max)
 apply (iscomm_weq_bck H), (iscomm_Lmax (_,,_,,lat)).
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isabsorb (binop_weq_bck H min) (binop_weq_bck H max)
 apply (isabsorb_weq_bck H), (Lmin_absorb (_,,_,,lat)).
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
min, max: binop X
lat: islatticeop min max
isabsorb (binop_weq_bck H max) (binop_weq_bck H min)
 apply (isabsorb_weq_bck H), (Lmax_absorb (_,,_,,lat)).
Qed.


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
lattice Y


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
lattice Y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
islatticeop (binop_weq_bck H (Lmin lat))
  (binop_weq_bck H (Lmax lat))

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
islatticeop (Lmin lat) (Lmax lat)

  apply (pr2 (pr2 lat)).
Defined.

(** *** Value of [Lle] *)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) = Lle (lattice_weq H lat)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) = Lle (lattice_weq H lat)

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x: Y
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x =
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y =
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y
Lmin lat (H x) (H y) = H x

    apply Hle.
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
fun_hrel_comp H (Lle lat) x y
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
x, y: Y
Hle: Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
invmap H (Lmin lat (H x) (H y)) = x

    apply Hle.
Qed.

(** *** Lattice with strong order *)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
islatticewithgtrel lat gt
→ islatticewithgtrel (lattice_weq H lat)
    (StrongOrder_bck H gt)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
islatticewithgtrel lat gt
→ islatticewithgtrel (lattice_weq H lat)
    (StrongOrder_bck H gt)

H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X

islatticewithgtrel (lattice_weq H lat)
  (StrongOrder_bck H gt)

lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y: Y
¬ StrongOrder_bck H gt x y
→ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y: Y
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
→ ¬ StrongOrder_bck H gt x y
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
∏ x y z : Y,
StrongOrder_bck H gt x z
→ StrongOrder_bck H gt y z
  → StrongOrder_bck H gt
      (Lmin (lattice_weq H lat) x y) z
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
∏ x y z : Y,
StrongOrder_bck H gt z x
→ StrongOrder_bck H gt z y
  → StrongOrder_bck H gt z
      (Lmax (lattice_weq H lat) x y)

H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y: Y
¬ StrongOrder_bck H gt x y
→ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

lat: lattice X

x, y: Y

lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y: Y

binop_weq_bck H (Lmin lat) x y = x

lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y: Y

Hle: Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

→ StrongOrder_bck H gt y z
  → StrongOrder_bck H gt
      (Lmin (lattice_weq H lat) x y) z

X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X

x, y, z: Y

Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt y z

x, y, z: Y

Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt y z
gt (H y) (H z)

    exact Hy.
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
∏ x y z : Y,
StrongOrder_bck H gt z x
→ StrongOrder_bck H gt z y
  → StrongOrder_bck H gt z
      (Lmax (lattice_weq H lat) x y)
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
fun_hrel_comp H gt z (binop_weq_bck H (Lmax lat) x y)

    
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
gt (H z) (H (invmap H (Lmax lat (H x) (H y))))

    
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
gt (H z) (Lmax lat (H x) (H y))

    
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
gt (H z) (H x)
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
gt (H z) (H y)

    
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
gt: StrongOrder X
lat: lattice X
Hgt: islatticewithgtrel lat gt
x, y, z: Y
Hx: fun_hrel_comp H gt z x
Hy: fun_hrel_comp H gt z y
gt (H z) (H y)

    exact Hy.
Qed.

X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticewithgt X
latticewithgt Y


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticewithgt X
latticewithgt Y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticewithgt X
islatticewithgtrel (lattice_weq H lat)
  (StrongOrder_bck H (Lgt lat))

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticewithgt X
islatticewithgtrel lat (Lgt lat)

  apply (pr2 (pr2 lat)).
Defined.

(** *** Lattice with a decidable order *)


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
istotal (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
istotal (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
∨ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Lle lat (H x) (H y) ∨ Lle lat (H y) (H x)
→ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
  ∨ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H y) (H x)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x
 apply ii1, (pathscomp0 (maponpaths (invmap H) Hmin)), homotinvweqweq.
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H y) (H x)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) y x
 apply ii2, (pathscomp0 (maponpaths (invmap H) Hmin)), homotinvweqweq.
Qed.

X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
isdecrel (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
isdecrel (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Lle lat (H x) (H y) ⨿ ¬ Lle lat (H x) (H y)
→ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
  ⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: ¬ Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
 apply ii1, (pathscomp0 (maponpaths (invmap H) Hmin)), homotinvweqweq.
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: ¬ Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
⨿ ¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: ¬ Lle lat (H x) (H y)
¬ Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y

    
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
x, y: Y
Hmin: ¬ Lle lat (H x) (H y)
Hinv: Lle (lattice_weq H lat) x y
Lle lat (H x) (H y)

    apply pathsinv0, pathsweq1', pathsinv0, Hinv.
Qed.


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
latticedec X → latticedec Y


X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
latticedec X → latticedec Y

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
latticedec Y

H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
istotal (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))
× isdecrel (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))

H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
istotal (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
isdecrel (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))

  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
istotal (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
istotal (Lle lat)

    apply istotal_latticedec.
  
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
isdecrel (Lle (lattice_weq H lat))
 
X, Y: hSet
H: Y ≃ X
lat: latticedec X
isdecrel (Lle lat)

    apply isdecrel_latticedec.
Defined.

(** ** lattice in [abmonoid] *)

Open Scope multmonoid.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
∏ (k : Y) (x : X) (y : Y),
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (x,, y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  ((x + pr1 k)%addmonoid,, (y + k)%addmonoid)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
∏ (k : Y) (x : X) (y : Y),
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (x,, y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  ((x + pr1 k)%addmonoid,, (y + k)%addmonoid)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
k: Y
x: X
y: Y
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (x,, y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  ((x + pr1 k)%addmonoid,, (y + k)%addmonoid)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
k: Y
x: X
y: Y
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 (x,, y) + pr12 (x + pr1 k,, y + k) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 (x + pr1 k,, y + k) + pr12 (x,, y) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
k: Y
x: X
y: Y
(x + (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) y + pr1carrier (pr1 Y) k) +
 pr1 y)%addmonoid =
(x + pr1 k + pr1 y + pr1 y)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
k: Y
x: X
y: Y
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) y + (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) k + pr1 y))%addmonoid =
(pr1 k + (pr1 y + pr1 y))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
k: Y
x: X
y: Y
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) k + (pr1 y + pr1carrier (pr1 Y) y))%addmonoid =
(pr1 k + (pr1 y + pr1 y))%addmonoid

  reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition ispartrdistr {X : abmonoid} (Y : @submonoid X) (opp1 opp2 : binop X) :=
  ∏ (x y : X) (k : Y),
  opp2 (opp1 x y) (pr1 k) = opp1 (opp2 x (pr1 k)) (opp2 y (pr1 k)).

Section abmonoidfrac_lattice.

Context (X : abmonoid)
        (Y : @submonoid X)
        {min max : binop X}
        (Hmin_assoc : isassoc min)
        (Hmin_comm : iscomm min)
        (Hmax_assoc : isassoc max)
        (Hmax_comm : iscomm max)
        (Hmin_max : isabsorb min max)
        (Hmax_min : isabsorb max min)
        (Hmin : ispartrdistr Y min op)
        (Hmax : ispartrdistr Y max op).

(** generic lemmas *)

Local Definition abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun (f : binop X) : binop (X × Y) :=
  λ x y,
  (f (pr1 x * pr1 (pr2 y))%multmonoid (pr1 y * pr1 (pr2 x))%multmonoid ,, @op Y (pr2 x) (pr2 y)).


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ f : X → X → X,
ispartrdistr Y f op
→ iscomprelrelfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ f : X → X → X,
ispartrdistr Y f op
→ iscomprelrelfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
iscomprelrelfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y x y
→ binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y x' y'
  → binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x x')
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y y')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
(∑ a0 : Y,
 (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
 (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid)
→ (∑ a0 : Y,
   (pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
   (pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid)
  → ∑ a0 : Y,
    (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x x') +
     pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y y') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
    (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y y') +
     pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x x') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x x') +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y y') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y y') +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x x') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1
   (f (pr1 x + pr12 x') (pr1 x' + pr12 x),,
    pr2 x + pr2 x') +
 pr12 (f (pr1 y + pr12 y') (pr1 y' + pr12 y),,
       pr2 y + pr2 y') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1
   (f (pr1 y + pr12 y') (pr1 y' + pr12 y),,
    pr2 y + pr2 y') +
 pr12 (f (pr1 x + pr12 x') (pr1 x' + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 x') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
∑ a0 : Y,
(f (pr1 x + pr12 x') (pr1 x' + pr12 x) +
 pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(f (pr1 y + pr12 y') (pr1 y' + pr12 y) +
 pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(f (pr1 x + pr12 x') (pr1 x' + pr12 x) +
 pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') + pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid =
(f (pr1 y + pr12 y') (pr1 y' + pr12 y) +
 pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') + pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min

Hmax_assoc: isassoc max

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(f (pr1 x + pr12 x') (pr1 x' + pr12 x) +
 pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') + pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid =
(f (pr1 y + pr12 y') (pr1 y' + pr12 y) +
 pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') + pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
f
  (pr1 x + pr12 x' + pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') +
   pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid
  (pr1 x' + pr12 x + pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') +
   pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid =
f
  (pr1 y + pr12 y' + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
   pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid
  (pr1 y' + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
   pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid

(pr1 x' + pr12 x + pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') +

Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X

f: X → X → X

x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x + pr12 x' + (pr12 y + pr12 y') +
 (pr11 c + pr11 c'))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 y' + (pr12 x + pr12 x') +
 (pr11 c + pr11 c'))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X

c': ∑ a0 : Y,

(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x + (pr12 x' + (pr12 y + pr12 y')) +
 (pr11 c + pr11 c'))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + (pr12 y' + (pr12 x + pr12 x')) +
 (pr11 c + pr11 c'))%addmonoid

(pr1 x + pr12 y +
 (pr12 y' + pr12 x' + (pr11 c + pr11 c')))%addmonoid =

 (pr12 x' + pr12 y' + (pr11 c + pr11 c')))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min

f: X → X → X

x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c)%addmonoid

      apply (pr2 c).
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 x + pr1 (pr2 y + pr2 y') +
 pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 x') +
 pr1 (pr1 c + pr1 c'))%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 x + pr1 (pr2 y' + pr2 y) +
 pr1 (pr1 c' + pr1 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x' + pr2 x) +
 pr1 (pr1 c' + pr1 c))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 x + (pr12 y' + pr12 y) +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 y + (pr12 x' + pr12 x) +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + (pr12 x + (pr12 y' + pr12 y)) +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + (pr12 y + (pr12 x' + pr12 x)) +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X

c': ∑ a0 : Y,

(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + (pr12 y' + pr12 y + pr12 x) +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid =

 (pr11 c' + pr11 c))%addmonoid

c': ∑ a0 : Y,

(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr12 y + pr12 x +

Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min

c: ∑ a0 : Y,

c': ∑ a0 : Y,

(pr1 x' + pr12 y' +
 (pr12 y + pr12 x + (pr11 c' + pr11 c)))%addmonoid =

Y: submonoid X

(pr1 x' + pr12 y' +
 (pr11 c' + pr11 c + (pr12 y + pr12 x)))%addmonoid =

c: ∑ a0 : Y,

c': ∑ a0 : Y,

 (pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid =

x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr11 c' + pr11 c +
 (pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid =

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr11 c' + pr11 c +
 (pr12 x + pr12 y))%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr11 c' + pr11 c +

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
x, y, x', y': abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x' + pr12 y' + pr11 c')%addmonoid =
(pr1 y' + pr12 x' + pr11 c')%addmonoid

      apply (pr2 c').
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f : X → X → X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op),
iscomm f
→ iscomm
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f : X → X → X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op),
iscomm f
→ iscomm
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
iscomm
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y =
   setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y =
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x0),,
 ?pr2@{x:=x0})
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y =
   setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x)
 apply (pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (abmonoidfrac X Y)))).
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y =
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x0),,
 (pr211 (abmonoidfrac X Y))
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y)
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x0))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(λ x y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y =
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x),,
 (pr211 (abmonoidfrac X Y))
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y)
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y x))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y x)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (f (pr1 x + pr12 y)%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid,,
   (pr2 x + pr2 y)%addmonoid) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr1 x + pr12 y)%addmonoid,,
   (pr2 y + pr2 x)%addmonoid)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hcomm: iscomm f
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr12 y + pr1 x)%addmonoid,,
   (pr2 y + pr2 x)%addmonoid) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr12 y + pr1 x)%addmonoid,,
   (pr2 y + pr2 x)%addmonoid)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f : X → X → X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op),
isassoc f
→ isassoc
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))

min, max: binop X

Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f : X → X → X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op),
isassoc f
→ isassoc
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))

isassoc
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
