X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y) z =
   setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y z))
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
∏ x x' x'' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y z : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y) z =
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y z)),,
 ?pr2@{x:=x0})
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x y) z =
   setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y z))
 apply (pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (abmonoidfrac X Y)))).
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
∏ x x' x'' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y z : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y) z =
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y z)),,
 (pr211 (abmonoidfrac X Y))
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0 y) z)
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) y z)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
  (setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z) =
setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z))

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z))

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)) + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)))%addmonoid =
(pr1
   (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f y z)) +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x y) z))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(pr1
   (f
      (pr1
         (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 z)
      (pr1 z +
       pr12 (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y)),,
    pr2
      (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr2 z) +
 pr12 (f
         (pr1 x +
          pr12 (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
                pr2 y + pr2 z))
         (pr1
            (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
             pr2 y + pr2 z) + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x +
       pr2
         (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
          pr2 y + pr2 z)))%addmonoid =
(pr1
   (f
      (pr1 x +
       pr12 (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
             pr2 y + pr2 z))
      (pr1
         (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
          pr2 y + pr2 z) + pr12 x),,
    pr2 x +
    pr2
      (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y),,
       pr2 y + pr2 z)) +
 pr12 (f
         (pr1
            (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 z)
         (pr1 z +
          pr12 (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
                pr2 x + pr2 y)),,
       pr2
         (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr2 z))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(f (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z)
   (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y)) +
 (pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z)))%addmonoid =
(f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))
   (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y) + pr12 x) +
 (pr12 x + pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(f (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z)
   (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y)) +
 (pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z)))%addmonoid =
(f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))
   (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y) + pr12 x) +
 (pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f
  (f (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y))%addmonoid =
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 z) (pr1 z + pr12 y) + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f
  (f (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z)%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z)%addmonoid)
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y))%addmonoid =
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z)%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z)%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y))%addmonoid) =
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + (pr12 x + pr12 z))%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y))%addmonoid) =
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + (pr12 z + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + (pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f: X → X → X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hassoc: isassoc f
x, y, z: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + (pr12 z + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + (pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid) =
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z))%addmonoid
  (f (pr1 y + (pr12 z + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + (pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid)

    reflexivity.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f g : binop X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op)
(Hg : ispartrdistr Y g op),
isabsorb f g
→ isabsorb
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg))


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
∏ (f g : binop X) (Hf : ispartrdistr Y f op)
(Hg : ispartrdistr Y g op),
isabsorb f g
→ isabsorb
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
isabsorb
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf))
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x y) = x)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x0 y) = x0),,
 ?pr2@{x:=x0})
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
     (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
        (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x y) = x)
 apply (setproperty (abmonoidfrac X Y)).
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x0 y) = x0),,
 setproperty (abmonoidfrac X Y)
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x0
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x0 y)) x0)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(λ x y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
    (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
       (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x y) = x),,
 setproperty (abmonoidfrac X Y)
   (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf) x
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg) x y)) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def f Hf)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotfun2 (hrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g)
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def g Hg)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun f x
     (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun g x y)) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (f
     (pr1 x +
      pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
            pr2 x + pr2 y))%addmonoid
     (pr1
        (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
         pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x)%addmonoid,,
   (pr2 x +
    pr2
      (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 y))%addmonoid) =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1
   (f
      (pr1 x +
       pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y))
      (pr1
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
    pr2 x +
    pr2
      (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 y)) + pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 pr12 (f
         (pr1 x +
          pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
                pr2 x + pr2 y))
         (pr1
            (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x +
       pr2
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y)) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(pr1
   (f
      (pr1 x +
       pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y))
      (pr1
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
    pr2 x +
    pr2
      (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 y)) + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 pr12 (f
         (pr1 x +
          pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
                pr2 x + pr2 y))
         (pr1
            (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x +
       pr2
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y)) + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(pr1
   (f
      (pr1 x +
       pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y))
      (pr1
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
    pr2 x +
    pr2
      (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x + pr2 y)) + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 pr12 (f
         (pr1 x +
          pr12 (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
                pr2 x + pr2 y))
         (pr1
            (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
             pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 x),,
       pr2 x +
       pr2
         (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
          pr2 x + pr2 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(f (pr1 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y))
   (g (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (g (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid) =
(pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid
  (g (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid) =
(pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid
  (g (pr1 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid) =
(pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x)))%addmonoid
  (g (pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x)))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid) =
(pr1 x + (pr12 x + (pr12 x + pr12 y)))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
f, g: binop X
Hf: ispartrdistr Y f op
Hg: ispartrdistr Y g op
Habsorb: isabsorb f g
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
f (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x + pr12 x))%addmonoid
  (g (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x + pr12 x))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid) =
(pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 x + pr12 x))%addmonoid

    apply Habsorb.
Qed.

(** definition of abmonoidfrac_lattice *)

Definition abmonoidfrac_min : binop (abmonoidfrac X Y) :=
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) _
              (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def min Hmin).
Definition abmonoidfrac_max : binop (abmonoidfrac X Y) :=
  setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) _
              (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def max Hmax).


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm abmonoidfrac_min


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm abmonoidfrac_min

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm min

  apply Hmin_comm.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc abmonoidfrac_min


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc abmonoidfrac_min

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc min

  apply Hmin_assoc.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm abmonoidfrac_max


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm abmonoidfrac_max

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
iscomm max

  apply Hmax_comm.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc abmonoidfrac_max


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc abmonoidfrac_max

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
min, max: binop X
Hmin_assoc: isassoc min
Hmin_comm: iscomm min
Hmax_assoc: isassoc max
Hmax_comm: iscomm max
Hmin_max: isabsorb min max
Hmax_min: isabsorb max min
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y min op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y max op
isassoc max

  apply Hmax_assoc.
Qed.

Y: submonoid X

Hmax_min: isabsorb max min

Qed.

End abmonoidfrac_lattice.

islatticeop (abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin)
  (abmonoidfrac_max X Y Hmax)

Defined.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
ispartbinophrel Y (Lle lat)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
ispartbinophrel Y (Lle lat)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat a b
  → Lle lat (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat a b
  → Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat a b
  → Lle lat (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
a, b, c: X
Yc: Y c
Lle lat a b
→ Lle lat (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
a, b, c: X
Yc: Y c
Lle lat a b
→ Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
a, b, c: X
Yc: Y c
(Lmin lat a b = a)%logic
→ ((Lmin lat a b + pr1 (c,, Yc))%addmonoid =
   (a + c)%addmonoid)%logic

    apply (maponpaths (λ x, op x _)).
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat a b
  → Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
a, b, c: X
Yc: Y c
Lle lat a b
→ Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
a, b, c: X
Yc: Y c
(Lmin lat a b = a)%logic
→ ((Lmin lat a b + pr1 (c,, Yc))%addmonoid =
   (a + c)%addmonoid)%logic

    apply (maponpaths (λ x, op x _)).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
  setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
  setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
  setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat))
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y
     (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat))
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def X Y (Lmin lat) Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
  setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y
→ setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
  setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y
binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y
→ binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y
    (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) x

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(∑ c0 : Y,
 Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
→ ∑ a0 : Y,
  (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
   pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
  (pr1 x +
   pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
   pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ a0 : Y,
(pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
 pr12 x + pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
 pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 x +
 pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr11 c +
 pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)
   (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c) + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)
   (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c) + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
?Goal
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
?Goal =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c)%addmonoid = ?Goal0
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(?Goal0 + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr12 y + (pr11 c + pr12 x))%addmonoid =
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
 pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr12 x + (pr12 y + pr11 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
 pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y) + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  apply pathsinv0, assocax.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y
    (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y
    (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y
    (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat))
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def X Y (Lmin lat) Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
→ setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
    (abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat))
    (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y
       (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin))
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
→ abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) x
→ abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
(∑ a0 : Y,
 (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
  pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
 (pr1 x +
  pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
  pr1 a0)%addmonoid)
→ ∑ c0 : Y,
  Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
    (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
(∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
 (Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 x +
  pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
 (pr1 x +
  (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
   pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr1 a0)%addmonoid)
→ ∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
  Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
    (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
Lmin lat
  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x + pr1 c))%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 (pr2 x + pr1 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x + pr1 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr1 (pr2 x + pr1 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 (pr2 x + pr1 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 x +
 pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 x +
 pr11 c)%addmonoid = ?Goal
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
?Goal = (pr1 x + pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y) + pr11 c))%addmonoid =
(pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y) +
 (pr11 c + pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x)))%addmonoid =
(pr12 y + (pr12 x + pr11 c))%addmonoid

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
H: setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
  (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x
c: ∑ a0 : pr1 Y,
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) +
 pr12 x + pr1 a0)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x +
 (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
  pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + 
 pr1 a0)%addmonoid
(pr11 c + pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x))%addmonoid =
(pr12 x + pr11 c)%addmonoid

  apply commax.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  x y <->
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  x y <->
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (∑
   _ : abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y
       → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           x y,
   Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
   → abmonoidfracrel X Y
       (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (∑
  _ : abmonoidfracrel X Y
        (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y
      → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
          x0 y,
  Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0 y
  → abmonoidfracrel X Y
      (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y),,
 ?pr2@{x:=x0})
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (∑
   _ : abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y
       → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           x y,
   Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
   → abmonoidfracrel X Y
       (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y)
 apply isapropdirprod ;
    apply isapropimpl, propproperty.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X Y,
(λ x0 y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (∑
  _ : abmonoidfracrel X Y
        (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y
      → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
          x0 y,
  Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0 y
  → abmonoidfracrel X Y
      (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y),,
 isapropdirprod
   (abmonoidfracrel X Y
      (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y
    → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0
        y)
   (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0 y
    → abmonoidfracrel X Y
        (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y)
   (isapropimpl
      (abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y)
      (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0
         y)
      (propproperty
         (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
            x0 y)))
   (isapropimpl
      (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x0
         y)
      (abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y)
      (propproperty
         (abmonoidfracrel X Y
            (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x0 y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
(λ x y : setquot (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (∑
  _ : abmonoidfracrel X Y
        (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y
      → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
          y,
  Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
  → abmonoidfracrel X Y
      (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y),,
 isapropdirprod
   (abmonoidfracrel X Y
      (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y
    → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y)
   (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
    → abmonoidfracrel X Y
        (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y)
   (isapropimpl
      (abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y)
      (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)
      (propproperty
         (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
            x y)))
   (isapropimpl
      (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)
      (abmonoidfracrel X Y
         (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y)
      (propproperty
         (abmonoidfracrel X Y
            (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin) x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y
    (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
 apply abmonoidfrac_Lle_1.
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: abmonoiddirprod X Y
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y
    (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
 apply abmonoidfrac_Lle_2.
Qed.

(** *** lattice with a strong order in [abmonoidfrac] *)

Section abmonoidfrac_latticewithgt.

Context (X : abmonoid)
        (Y : @submonoid X)
        (lat : lattice X)
        (gt : StrongOrder X)
        (Hnotgtle : ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y)
        (Hlenotgt : ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y)
        (Hgtmin : ∏ x y z : X, gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z)
        (Hgtmax : ∏ x y z : X, gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y))

        (Hgt : ispartbinophrel Y gt)
        (Hop : ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), y * pr1 x = z * pr1 x → y = z)
        (Hmin : ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op)
        (Hmax : ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op).


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x y
→ Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x y
→ Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s0
   → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s s0)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0
  → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0),,
 ?pr2@{s:=H; s0:=H0})
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s0
   → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s s0)
 apply isapropimpl, propproperty.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0
  → Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0),,
 isapropimpl
   (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0)
   (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0)
   (propproperty
      (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H
         H0))) (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat))
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y
     (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
