gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
¬ gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
    (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt x y

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
H0: gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 x)%addmonoid

    exact H0.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
→ ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x y


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y : abmonoidfrac X Y,
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x y
→ ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x y

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s s0
   → ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s0)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0
  → ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0),,
 ?pr2@{s:=H; s0:=H0})
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s s0
   → ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s0)
 apply isapropimpl, isapropimpl, isapropempty.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0
  → ¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0),,
 isapropimpl
   (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H H0)
   (¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0)
   (isapropimpl
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H0) ∅
      isapropempty))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: abmonoidfracrel X Y
  (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
¬ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
H: abmonoidfracrel X Y
  (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) → ∅

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) → ∅

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat))
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y
     (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
→ setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
    (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
    (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y) → ∅

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrelint X Y (Lle lat) x y
→ abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt x y → ∅

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
(∑ c0 : Y,
 Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
→ (∑ c0 : Y,
   gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
  → make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Lle lat ?Goal ?Goal0
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt ?Goal ?Goal0

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c')%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c')%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c')%addmonoid
   (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c')%addmonoid =
 (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c')%addmonoid)%logic

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
((Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr11 c')%addmonoid =
 (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c')%addmonoid)%logic

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
c: ∑ c0 : Y,
Lle lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
c': ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr11 c)%addmonoid =
(pr1 x + pr12 y + pr11 c)%addmonoid

    apply (pr2 c).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x z
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt y z
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
      (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y) z


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt x z
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt y z
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
      (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y) z

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0, s1: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s1
   → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s0 s1
     → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
         (Lmin
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s
            s0) s1)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' x'' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H1
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
        (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0) H1),, 
 ?pr2@{s:=H; s0:=H0; s1:=H1})
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0, s1: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s s1
   → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s0 s1
     → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
         (Lmin
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s
            s0) s1)
 apply isapropimpl, isapropimpl, propproperty.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' x'' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H1
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
        (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0) H1),,
 isapropimpl (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H1)
   (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
        (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0) H1)
   (isapropimpl
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1)
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
         (Lmin
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H
            H0) H1)
      (propproperty
         (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
            (Lmin
               (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
               H H0) H1))))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H1
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
        (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0) H1),,
 isapropimpl (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H H1)
   (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
        (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0) H1)
   (isapropimpl
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H0 H1)
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
         (Lmin
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H
            H0) H1)
      (propproperty
         (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt
            (Lmin
               (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
               H H0) H1))))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
  → abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
      (abmonoidfrac_min X Y Hmin
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y))
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
→ setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
    (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
    (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
  → setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
      (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
      (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat))
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def X Y (Lmin lat) Hmin)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y))
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt x z
→ abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt y z
  → abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) z

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
(∑ c0 : Y,
 gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
→ (∑ c0 : Y,
   gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
     (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
  → ∑ c0 : Y,
    gt
      (pr1
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
       pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
      (pr1 z +
       pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x
               y) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt
  (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
   pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmin lat) x y) +
   pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt
  (pr1
     (Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
      pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   pr12 (Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
         pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : pr1 Y,
gt
  (Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z +
   pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (Lmin lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (Lmin lat
     (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid)
  (pr1 z +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y

→ y = z

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 x + (pr12 y + pr12 z) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

  (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid =
(pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid
→ gt
    (pr1 x + pr12 z + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid
    (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X

Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,

  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid

Y (pr12 y)

gt: StrongOrder X

→ y = z

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,

  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr11 cx)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr11 cx)%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr11 cx)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr11 cx)%addmonoid

      apply (pr2 cx).
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 x) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 Y) (pr2 y)) +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y

→ y = z

gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr12 x + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr12 x + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + (pr12 x + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx)))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + (pr12 x + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx)))%addmonoid

gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y

Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z

→ y = z

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx + pr12 x))%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + (pr11 cy + pr11 cx + pr12 x))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X

Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr11 cy)%addmonoid
  (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr11 cy)%addmonoid

      apply (pr2 cy).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z x
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z y
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z
      (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z x
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z y
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt z
      (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0, s1: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1 s
   → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1 s0
     → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1
         (Lmax
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s
            s0))
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' x'' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
        (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0)),, ?pr2@{s:=H; s0:=H0; s1:=H1})
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
s, s0, s1: setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1 s
   → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1 s0
     → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt s1
         (Lmax
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) s
            s0))
 apply isapropimpl, isapropimpl, propproperty.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x x' x'' : setwithbinopdirprod X Y,
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
        (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0)),,
 isapropimpl (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H)
   (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
        (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0))
   (isapropimpl
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0)
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
         (Lmax
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H
            H0))
      (propproperty
         (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
            (Lmax
               (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
               H H0)))))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x'')
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
(λ H H0 H1 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y),
 (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
        (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0)),,
 isapropimpl (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H)
   (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0
    → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
        (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
           H H0))
   (isapropimpl
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1 H0)
      (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
         (Lmax
            (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) H
            H0))
      (propproperty
         (StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt H1
            (Lmax
               (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax)
               H H0)))))
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
→ abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
  → abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
      (abmonoidfrac_max X Y Hmax
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y))

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
  (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
  (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
→ setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
    (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
    (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y)
  → setquotuniv2 (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) hPropset
      (abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt)
      (iscomprelabmonoidfracrelint X Y Hgt)
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) z)
      (setquotfun2 (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X Y)
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat))
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_def X Y (Lmax lat) Hmax)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) x)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X Y) y))

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt z x
→ abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt z y
  → abmonoidfracrelint X Y gt z
      (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat) x y)

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
(∑ c0 : Y,
 gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
   (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
→ (∑ c0 : Y,
   gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid)
  → ∑ c0 : Y,
    gt
      (pr1 z +
       pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat) x
               y) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
      (pr1
         (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat) x y) +
       pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt
  (pr1 z +
   pr12 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat) x y) +
   pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 (abmonoidfrac_lattice_fun X Y (Lmax lat) x y) +
   pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt
  (pr1 z +
   pr12 (Lmax lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
         pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1
     (Lmax lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x),,
      pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (Lmax lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z +
   pr1 c0)%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (Lmax lat (pr1 x + pr12 y) (pr1 y + pr12 x) + pr12 z +
   pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (Lmax lat
     (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
     (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid)

  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt

gt
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 y + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid

gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
(pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid =
(pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid
→ gt
    (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid
    (pr1 x + pr12 z + (pr12 y + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy)))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y))%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y))%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr11 cx + pr11 cy + pr12 y)%addmonoid

      
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
Y (pr12 y)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr11 cx + pr11 cy)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr11 cx + pr11 cy)%addmonoid

Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + pr1 (pr2 x + pr2 y) + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + pr1 (pr1 cx + pr1 cy))%addmonoid

lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X

Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op

gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid

cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt
  (pr1 z + (pr12 x + pr12 y) + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 x + pr12 z + (pr11 cx + pr11 cy))%addmonoid

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
gt: StrongOrder X
Hnotgtle: ∏ x y : X, ¬ gt x y → Lle lat x y
Hlenotgt: ∏ x y : X, Lle lat x y → ¬ gt x y
Hgtmin: ∏ x y z : X,
gt x z → gt y z → gt (Lmin lat x y) z
Hgtmax: ∏ x y z : X,
gt z x → gt z y → gt z (Lmax lat x y)
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y gt
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
x, y, z: setwithbinopdirprod X Y
cx: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 x + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 x + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
cy: ∑ c0 : Y,
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr1 c0)%addmonoid
gt (pr1 z + pr12 y + pr11 cy)%addmonoid
  (pr1 y + pr12 z + pr11 cy)%addmonoid

      apply (pr2 cy).
Qed.

End abmonoidfrac_latticewithgt.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y (Lgt lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
latticewithgt (abmonoidfrac X Y)

Y: submonoid X

Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X

Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),

→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt x z
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt y z
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y 
      (Lgt lat) Hgt
      (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y) z

Y: submonoid X

→ y = z

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt z x
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt z y
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y 
      (Lgt lat) Hgt z
      (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)

X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y (Lgt lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt x z
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt y z
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt
      (Lmin (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y) z

Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X

Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : X,
Lgt lat x z → Lgt lat y z → Lgt lat (Lmin lat x y) z

    apply Lmin_Lgt.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y (Lgt lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : abmonoidfrac X Y,
StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt z x
→ StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt z y
  → StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y (Lgt lat) Hgt z
      (Lmax (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x
         y)
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticewithgt X
Hgt: ispartbinophrel Y (Lgt lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x y z : X,
Lgt lat z x → Lgt lat z y → Lgt lat z (Lmax lat x y)

    apply Lmax_Lgt.
Defined.

(** *** lattice with a decidable order in [abmonoidfrac] *)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x1 x2 : abmonoidfrac X Y,
?Goal x1 x2 <->
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x1 x2
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal ?Goal

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ x1 x2 : abmonoidfrac X Y,
?Goal x1 x2 <->
Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax) x1 x2
 apply abmonoidfrac_Lle.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': istotal (Lle lat)
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal
  (abmonoidfracrel X Y
     (ispartbinophrel_Lle X Y lat Hmin))
 apply istotalabmonoidfracrel, is'.
Qed.

Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel
  (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))

Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
  → Lle lat a b

      intros x y z Hz ;
        rewrite !(commax X z) ;
        unfold Lle ;
        rewrite <- (Hmin _ _ (z,,Hz)) ;
        apply Hop.
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
  → Lle lat a b
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
∏ a b c : X,
Y c
→ Lle lat (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
  → Lle lat a b

      intros x y z Hz ;
        unfold Lle ;
        rewrite <- (Hmin _ _ (z,,Hz)) ;
        apply Hop.
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: lattice X
is': isdecrel (Lle lat)
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel (Lle lat)
 apply is'.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
latticedec (abmonoidfrac X Y)


X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
latticedec (abmonoidfrac X Y)

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))
× isdecrel
    (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))

Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel
  (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))

  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
istotal (Lle lat)

    apply istotal_latticedec.
  
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel
  (Lle (abmonoidfrac_lattice X Y lat Hmin Hmax))
 
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel (Lle lat)
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid
→ y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z

    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
isdecrel (Lle lat)
 apply isdecrel_latticedec.
    
X: abmonoid
Y: submonoid X
lat: latticedec X
Hop: ∏ (x : Y) (y z : X), (y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
Hmin: ispartrdistr Y (Lmin lat) op
Hmax: ispartrdistr Y (Lmax lat) op
∏ (x : Y) (y z : X),
(y + pr1 x)%addmonoid = (z + pr1 x)%addmonoid → y = z
 apply Hop.
Defined.

Close Scope multmonoid.

Definition dual_lattice {X : hSet} (l : lattice X) : lattice X := make_lattice (((isassoc_Lmax l),, (iscomm_Lmax l)),, ((isassoc_Lmin l),,(iscomm_Lmin l)),,(Lmax_absorb l),,(Lmin_absorb l)).

Section hProp_lattice.


lattice (hProp,, isasethProp)


lattice (hProp,, isasethProp)


binop (hProp,, isasethProp)
binop (hProp,, isasethProp)
islatticeop ?min ?max


binop (hProp,, isasethProp)
 intros P Q; exact (P ∧ Q).

binop (hProp,, isasethProp)
 simpl; intros P Q; exact (P ∨ Q).

islatticeop
  ((λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
   :
   binop (hProp,, isasethProp))
  (((λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q) : binop hProp)
   :
   binop (hProp,, isasethProp))
 
isassoc (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
iscomm (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
isassoc (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
iscomm (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
isabsorb (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
  (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
isabsorb (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
  (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)

  
isassoc (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
 intros P Q R; apply isassoc_hconj.
  
iscomm (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
 intros P Q; apply iscomm_hconj.
  
isassoc (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
 intros P Q R; apply isassoc_hdisj.
  
iscomm (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
 intros P Q; apply iscomm_hdisj.
  
isabsorb (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
  (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
 intros P Q; apply hconj_absorb_hdisj.
  
isabsorb (λ P Q : hProp, P ∨ Q)
  (λ P Q : hProp,, isasethProp, P ∧ Q)
 intros P Q; apply hdisj_absorb_hconj.
Defined.

End hProp_lattice.
